_comment: Curated physical service points for Toronto's vulnerable population. Coordinates are approximate (derived from street addresses) and should be confirmed against the live City pages. Warming/respite sites are SEASONAL and may not be open year-round or every year. Harm-reduction sites are volatile (several Ontario sites closed/relocated in 2025) - verify status before relying on a pin.

locations.name: Streets to Homes Assessment & Referral Centre (SHARC)
locations.notes: Walk-in shelter referral & housing help. Also takes referral calls: 416-338-4766.

locations.name: Warming Centre - 81 Elizabeth St
locations.notes: Regular warming centre. Walk-in, pet-friendly, no intake needed. Activated ~-5C or weather warning.

locations.name: Warming Centre - 885 Scarborough Golf Club Rd
locations.notes: Regular warming centre.

locations.name: Warming Centre - 136 Spadina Rd
locations.notes: Regular warming centre.

locations.name: Warming Centre - 349 George St
locations.notes: Regular warming centre.

locations.name: Warming Centre - 12 Holmes Ave
locations.notes: Regular warming centre.

locations.name: Warming Centre - Cecil Community Centre
locations.notes: Extra cold-weather site, opens when temps reach about -15C.

locations.name: Warming Centre - Jimmie Simpson Recreation Centre
locations.notes: Extra cold-weather site, opens when temps reach about -15C.

locations.name: Winter Respite - Covenant House (youth)
locations.notes: 24h winter respite for vulnerable youth. Operated by Covenant House.

locations.name: Winter Respite - Scott Mission (men)
locations.notes: 24h winter respite for men. Operated by Scott Mission.

locations.name: Winter Respite - Homes First (women)
locations.notes: 24h winter respite for women. Operated by Homes First.

locations.name: Winter Respite - Better Living Centre
locations.notes: 24h winter respite, typically opens mid-December.

locations.name: The Stop Community Food Centre
locations.notes: Food bank, drop-in meals, community kitchens, good-food market.

locations.name: Kensington Market Overdose Prevention Site (KMOPS)
locations.notes: Overdose prevention site (The Neighbourhood Group). VERIFY status/location - Ontario sites have faced closures.

locations.name: Moss Park Consumption & Treatment Service
locations.notes: Run by South Riverdale Community Health Centre. VERIFY current status/address.

locations.name: Access to Housing Resource Centre
locations.notes: City's RGI / community-housing centralized waitlist - apply & get support. Application Support Centre: 416-338-8888.

locations.name: Toronto Community Housing - Head Office
locations.notes: Largest social-housing provider. Client Care: 416-981-5500.

locations.name: TCHC Tenant Service Hub - West
locations.notes: In-person tenant services (access off Champlain Blvd).

locations.name: TCHC Tenant Service Hub - Central
locations.notes: In-person tenant services.

locations.name: TCHC Tenant Service Hub - East
locations.notes: In-person tenant services.

directories.name: 211 Ontario
directories.note: Dial 211. Province-wide directory of social services.

directories.name: City of Toronto Homeless Help hub
directories.note: Master landing page for shelter/respite/housing services.

directories.name: Warming Centres (live status + e-Updates)
directories.note: Open/close status - sign up for alerts.

directories.name: Daily Shelter & Overnight Occupancy (Open Data + API)
directories.note: Live per-program occupancy/capacity. Drives the stats panel on this map.

directories.name: Rent-Geared-to-Income (RGI) subsidy
directories.note: Apply to Toronto's centralized subsidized-housing waitlist.

directories.name: Toronto Community Housing - Subsidized/RGI
directories.note: Largest social-housing provider in the city.

directories.name: Housing Help & Support Services (centre directory)
directories.note: Find a local Housing Help Centre for eviction prevention, housing search, and RGI application help.

directories.name: SocialHousingApplication.com
directories.note: Centralized application for many Ontario service-manager areas.

directories.name: Harm Reduction Supplies & Locations (Toronto Public Health)
